title: EventEnvelope
description: EventEnvelope defines the canonical structure for all events in the system. This is a frozen contract that all subsystems must comply with.

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor that initiated this event

causation_id.description: Causation ID for causal relationships between events

correlation_id.description: Correlation ID for tracing across multiple events

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific event

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key for preventing duplicate processing

payload.description: Additional contextual data for the event

session_id.description: Session identifier for the run this event belongs to

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the event occurred
